labs.actionRequired: adjust dose or discontinue if hyperkalemia occurs
labs.clinicalContext: Risk of hyperkalemia with MRA therapy requiring dose adjustment or discontinuation

labRequirements.specialPopulationNotes: Particular caution needed in patients with reduced eGFR where hyperkalemia risk is increased
labRequirements.sourceSnippet: potassium ≤5.5 mmol/L. With serum potassium > 5.5 mmol/L... Steroidal MRA, such as spironolactone and eplerenone, have established cardiovascular benefits in those with heart failure

governance.sourceDocument: KDIGO 2022 Clinical Practice Guideline for Diabetes Management in Chronic Kidney Disease
